changelog:
v1.4.1 — Payment & Windows Stability:

- Premium checkout black screen fix — prevents double-pop + zombie session on payment flow.
- Windows close-to-tray hardening — single-instance guard, native AUMID identity, quit lifecycle prevents zombie processes.
- Portrait resolution selectors — download quality picker now supports portrait video dimensions.
- Windows Ctrl+Q routes to real quit path (was swallowed by close-to-tray).
- macOS Cmd+Q restores native NSApp.terminate behavior.
